recommendations.title: Norbit
recommendations.overview: A mild-mannered guy who is engaged to a monstrous woman meets the woman of his dreams, and schemes to find a way to be with her.

recommendations.title: The Pimp
recommendations.overview: A mild-mannered banker is forced to masquerade as a notorious gangster and pimp.

recommendations.title: Meet Bill
recommendations.overview: A mild-mannered bank executive mentors a teenage con artist and tries to make a career change as a doughnut merchant.

recommendations.title: Saw II
recommendations.overview: The chilling and relentless Jigsaw killer returns to terrorize the city once again. When a gruesome murder victim emerges with unmistakable traces of Jigsaw's sinister methods, Detective Eric Matthews is thrust into a high-stakes investigation. To hi

recommendations.title: The House
recommendations.overview: Across different eras, a poor family, an anxious developer and a fed-up landlady become tied to the same mysterious house in this animated dark comedy.
recommendations.director: Paloma Baeza, Emma De Swaef, Marc James Roels, Niki Lindroth von Bahr

recommendations.title: Dear Basketball
recommendations.overview: An animated telling of Kobe Bryant's titular poem, signaling his retirement from the sport that made his name.

recommendations.title: Night of the Animated Dead
recommendations.overview: An animated retelling of ‘Night of the Living Dead’, in which a group of people in a rural farmhouse struggle to survive the threat of bloodthirsty zombies.

recommendations.title: The Cameraman's Revenge
recommendations.overview: A jilted husband takes his revenge by filming his wife and her lover and showing the result at the local cinema. This was one of Starewicz' first animated films, and stars a cast of animated beetles.

recommendations.title: Saw VI
recommendations.overview: Special Agent Strahm is dead, and Detective Hoffman has emerged as the unchallenged successor to Jigsaw's legacy. However, when the FBI draws closer to Hoffman, he is forced to set a game into motion, and Jigsaw's grand scheme is finally understood.

recommendations.title: Game of Thrones - Conquest & Rebellion: An Animated History of the Seven Kingdoms
recommendations.overview: HBO's animated history of Westeros brings to life all the events that shaped the Seven Kingdoms in the thousands of years before Game of Thrones' story begins.
